templates.body:
SOD CHARTER
Name: Service Operations Desk (or local name)
Owns: RMA ship, returns, evals, closure templates, part collection chase
Does not own: technical diagnosis, customer engineering decisions
Support owns: problem solve, disposition decision
Lead SOD: _______________  Lead Support: _______________
Start date: _______

SUPPORT TO SOD HANDOFF
Ticket: _______________  Customer: _______________
Disposition: ship / return / eval / collect
Part SKU/qty: _______________
Why (one line): _______________
Address / RMA auth: _______________
Support owner: _______________  SOD owner: _______________
Incomplete = no ship

SOD SCOPE LOCK
In: _______________
Out (send to): _______________
New ask process: _______________
Reviewed: weekly with support lead

SOD SCORECARD
Period: _______
Ship SLA hit %: ___
Return close %: ___
Handoff reject % (incomplete): ___
Support hours still on logistics: ___
Notes: _______________

CLOSURE TEMPLATE INDEX
Template | Use when | Owner
Return received | | SOD
Eval complete | | SOD
Part collected | | SOD
Customer ship notify | | SOD
